title: gaultheria nivea
intro: Gaultheria nivea, also known as the snowberry or mountain pepper, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It is native to high-altitude regions of the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Gaultheria nivea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from coughs and colds, improved digestion, and reduced stress and anxiety.
